news.headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks to Own for Decades
news.summary: Businesses with strong free cash flow tend to be more adaptable and resilient. Some of these companies shine bright by using their cash wisely to strengthen their market positions.

news.headline: Why women's sports is the next big trade: Monarch Collective Exec
news.summary: Monarch Collective Co-Founder Kara Nortman joins Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to discuss her pioneering investments in women's sports and explains why this rapidly expanding ecosystem is the next multibillion-dollar asset class.
